paperTitle: Moto: Latent Motion Token as the Bridging Language for Learning Robot Manipulation from Videos
organization: University of Hong Kong / Tencent ARC Lab / CUHK / UC Berkeley

benchmarks.label: CALVIN
benchmarks.detail: Suites: 1 task 89.7 · 2 tasks 72.9 · 3 tasks 60.1 · 4 tasks 48.4 · 5 tasks 38.6 | Table 3 | Notes: ABC→D split, 1000 chains, avg_len metric reported. Uses Static RGB only (no gripper RGB or proprio for Moto).

benchmarks.label: SimplerEnv
benchmarks.detail: Suites: google robot vm 59.2 | Tasks: pick coke can vm 74 · move near vm 60.4 · open close drawer vm 43.1 | Table 2 | Notes: Reports Google Robot Visual Matching only (no VA, no WidowX). Uses 3 standard tasks. Paper reports on 0-1 scale, converted to 0-100.
